tasks.title: Create ContentNotFound.tsx React component
tasks.description: Create src/components/ContentNotFound.tsx as a React functional component that displays a user-friendly message 'Content Not Found' with a brief explanation and a link to return to the homepage. The component should be styled consistently with the app's design system, using existing CSS modules or styled-components conventions. Include accessibility features such as proper heading levels and aria attributes.
acceptanceCriteria: Component renders a clear 'Content Not Found' message
Includes a clickable link to the homepage
tasks.expectedResult: A new React component file src/components/ContentNotFound.tsx exists and passes lint and tests

outputPlan.description: React component for displaying content not found message

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides a user-friendly fallback UI for missing content routes

tasks.title: Add route for ContentNotFound component in router config
tasks.description: Modify src/AppRouter.tsx (or equivalent routing file) to add a catch-all route that renders the ContentNotFound component for unmatched paths. Ensure the route is placed last in the route list to catch all unmatched URLs. Import the ContentNotFound component properly. Confirm that navigation to unknown routes displays the ContentNotFound page.
acceptanceCriteria: Catch-all route added to router config
ContentNotFound component is rendered for unknown routes
tasks.expectedResult: Router config updated with catch-all route rendering ContentNotFound component

outputPlan.description: Add catch-all route for ContentNotFound component

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Enables routing to the ContentNotFound page for unmatched URLs

tasks.title: Add unit test for ContentNotFound component
tasks.description: Create a test file src/components/__tests__/ContentNotFound.test.tsx that imports the ContentNotFound component and verifies it renders the expected message and link. Use the existing testing framework (e.g., React Testing Library and Vitest). Include tests for accessibility attributes and link navigation.
acceptanceCriteria: Test file created for ContentNotFound component
Tests verify rendering of message and link
tasks.expectedResult: Unit tests for ContentNotFound component exist and pass

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Ensures the ContentNotFound component works correctly and is maintainable
